prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical smartphone mirror selfie that looks like a natural post on X: an adult Japanese woman in her 20s casually taking a photo while choosing clothes in a closet. She is close to the mirror, framed from head to upper thighs, sitting or crouching slightly with a relaxed posture, holding a silver triple-camera smartphone in her right hand so the phone partly covers the right side of the image. She has soft light-brown shoulder-length bob with airy bangs, large natural eyes, subtle everyday makeup, smooth skin, and a calm, slightly shy neutral expression while looking at the phone screen/mirror. Outfit: modest casual loungewear, exactly 2 visible clothing pieces: a fluffy dark charcoal-gray cardigan and a white ribbed T-shirt underneath; no glamorous styling, no revealing pose, no gravure look. Background: a real closet area with exactly 6 visible hanging garments in soft neutral tones: cream, blue-gray, white, beige, black, and pale pink; sheer white curtain on the left with gentle morning daylight. Composition should feel unposed and domestic, with soft natural lighting, shallow depth of field, realistic mirror edge visible on the right, slight smartphone-camera softness, authentic skin texture, and no added text, watermark, studio lighting, or overly polished fashion-shoot atmosphere. Use quiet morning, natural, approachable everyday feeling.
